mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM posts WHERE status = 'published'
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM comments WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM users WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM posts WHERE status = 'published' AND DATE(publish_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM comments WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()
